text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way to the shopping district when I
encounter Haru Urara singing a tune.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
choice_data_list: Did something put you in a good mood?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
The people from the shopping district got me a
"you can do it" present! Isn't that sweet?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Last time it was a "don't overdo it" gift, but now
it's "you can do it"!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I bet it's because I've got a lot more "oomph" in
my running these days!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And you're part of the reason why, Trainer!
choice_data_list: We're both in it to win it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Three cheers for us! Hip, hip, hooray!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I promise Haru Urara that we'll both give it our
best shot.
